name: csa-ppt
description: All-in-one presentation toolkit for Cloud Solution Architects (Azure/AWS/GCP). Includes: csa-ppt (smart orchestrator), azure-diagrams (700+ cloud icons), excalidraw-diagram (hand-drawn style), frontend-slides (HTML presentations), pptx (OOXML PowerPoint), skywork-ppt (quick PPT generation). Covers customer demos, tech sharing, workshops, architecture reviews, and template filling.

skills.name: csa-ppt
skills.description: Smart orchestrator — analyzes requests and routes to the best tool chain

skills.name: azure-diagrams
skills.description: 700+ cloud icons (Azure/AWS/GCP), architecture diagrams, swimlane flows, ERDs, timelines

skills.name: excalidraw-diagram
skills.description: Hand-drawn style diagrams for brainstorming and conceptual visuals

skills.name: frontend-slides
skills.description: Zero-dependency HTML presentations, great for Chinese content and code

skills.name: pptx
skills.description: Full OOXML-level PowerPoint creation and editing

skills.name: skywork-ppt
skills.description: Quick PowerPoint generation, template-based creation, and slide operations

skills.name: planning-with-files
skills.description: Task planning with file-based progress tracking for multi-slide decks
